import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; export const metadata = { title: "About Us | NexSys", description: "Learn more about our company, mission, and team.", }; export default function AboutPage() { const team = [ { name: "Alex Mercer", role: "Chief Executive Officer", ext: "Visionary & Strategist" }, { name: "Samantha Lee", role: "CTO", ext: "Cloud & Systems Architect" }, { name: "David Chen", role: "Lead UI/UX", ext: "Design Systems Expert" }, { name: "Priya Sharma", role: "Head of AI", ext: "Machine Learning Solutions" }, ]; const skills = [ "Next.js / React", "Node.js / Python", "PostgreSQL / Supabase", "AWS / Vercel", "Tailwind CSS", "Framer Motion", "Machine Learning", "Cybersecurity" ]; return (

Redefining Digital Reality

At NexSys, we believe that software should be intuitive, intelligent, and invisible. We build the foundation that allows businesses to scale beyond their imagination.

Our Mission

We are on a mission to democratize enterprise-grade technology. By blending cutting-edge AI with robust software architecture, we deliver solutions that don't just solve today's problems—they anticipate tomorrow's challenges.

Core Values

  • Innovation: We push the boundaries of what's possible.
  • Integrity: We build transparent, secure, and honest systems.
  • Excellence: We accept nothing less than mathematical perfection in our code.

Our Expertise

A diverse skill set forged in the fires of hundreds of successful deployments.

{skills.map(skill => ( {skill} ))}

Meet The Leadership

The minds behind the architecture.

{team.map((member, i) => (
{member.name.charAt(0)}
{member.name} {member.role}

{member.ext}

 ))}
); }

"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"; import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dialog"; import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"; import { Plus, Search, MoreHorizontal, FileEdit, Trash2 } from "lucide-react"; import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu"; export default function ClientsPage() { const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); const [clients, setClients] = useState([ { id: "1", name: "Acme Corp", email: "contact@acme.com", phone: "+1 555-0101", address: "123 Main St", status: "Active" }, { id: "2", name: "Stark Industries", email: "tony@stark.com", phone: "+1 555-0102", address: "Malibu Point", status: "Active" }, { id: "3", name: "Wayne Enterprises", email: "bruce@wayne.com", phone: "+1 555-0103", address: "Gotham City", status: "Inactive" }, ]); const filteredClients = clients.filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || c.email.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())); return (

Clients

Manage your customer relationships and contact details.

Add Client } /> Add New Client
setSearch(e.target.value)} />
Company Email Phone Status {filteredClients.map((client) => ( {client.name} {client.email} {client.phone} {client.status} Open menu } /> Edit Delete ))} {filteredClients.length === 0 && ( No clients found. )}
); }

"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"; import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea"; import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { ArrowLeft, Plus, Trash2, Import } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; export default function CreateInvoicePage() { const router = useRouter(); const [items, setItems] = useState([{ id: 1, service: "", description: "", quantity: 1, unitPrice: 0 }]); const handleAddItem = () => { setItems([...items, { id: Date.now(), service: "", description: "", quantity: 1, unitPrice: 0 }]); }; const handleRemoveItem = (id: number) => { if (items.length > 1) { setItems(items.filter(item => item.id !== id)); } }; const updateItem = (id: number, field: string, value: string | number) => { setItems(items.map(item => item.id === id ? { ...item, [field]: value } : item)); }; const calculateSubtotal = () => { return items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.quantity * item.unitPrice), 0); }; const subtotal = calculateSubtotal(); const taxRate = 0.1; // 10% const tax = subtotal * taxRate; const grandTotal = subtotal + tax; const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); router.push("/admin/invoices"); }; const handleImportQuote = () => { // Simulate importing a quote setItems([ { id: Date.now(), service: "Web Development", description: "Frontend and backend implementation", quantity: 1, unitPrice: 15400.00 } ]); }; return (

Create Invoice

Bill a client for services rendered.

Client Details

Dashboard Overview

Welcome back. Here's a summary of your business.

{stats.map((stat, i) => ( {stat.title}
{stat.value}

{stat.trend}

))}

{activity.action}

{activity.by} • {activity.time}

))}
); }

"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"; import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea"; import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { ArrowLeft, Plus, Trash2 } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; export default function CreateQuotationPage() { const router = useRouter(); const [items, setItems] = useState([{ id: 1, service: "", description: "", quantity: 1, unitPrice: 0 }]); const handleAddItem = () => { setItems([...items, { id: Date.now(), service: "", description: "", quantity: 1, unitPrice: 0 }]); }; const handleRemoveItem = (id: number) => { if (items.length > 1) { setItems(items.filter(item => item.id !== id)); } }; const updateItem = (id: number, field: string, value: string | number) => { setItems(items.map(item => item.id === id ? { ...item, [field]: value } : item)); }; const calculateSubtotal = () => { return items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.quantity * item.unitPrice), 0); }; const subtotal = calculateSubtotal(); const taxRate = 0.1; // 10% const tax = subtotal * taxRate; const grandTotal = subtotal + tax; const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); // In a real scenario, you save to Supabase here router.push("/admin/quotations"); }; return (

Create Quotation

Generate a new proposal for a client.

Client Details

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

fix.text: unknown

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.

fix.text: never

suggestions.desc: Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
